name: kovixalabs-aismos
description: AISMOS monorepo for the KOVIXAILABS AI social media operating system.

scripts.dev:services: docker compose up -d postgres mongo redis qdrant
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,web,ai,workers -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:ai" "npm run dev:workers"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace @kovixalabs/api run build && npm --workspace @kovixalabs/workers run build && npm --workspace @kovixalabs/web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace @kovixalabs/api run typecheck && npm --workspace @kovixalabs/workers run typecheck && npm --workspace @kovixalabs/web run typecheck
